title: andira cordata
intro: Andira cordata, also known as the Brazil nut tree or Andiroba, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Andira cordata include reducing inflammation, alleviating pain, and treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Andira cordata can be made into oil, which is often used topically, and also into capsules or teas for internal use.
